message.content:
@startuml
actor "ユーザ" as User
boundary "ブラウザ" as Browser
control "web.php" as Web
control "PersonController" as Controller
entity "Person" as Person
boundary "person.find.blade" as Blade

User -> Browser: 該当ページをリクエスト[person/find]
Browser -> Web: GET[person/find]
Web -> Controller: @find
Controller -> Blade: 
User -> Blade: findボタン押下
Blade -> Web: POST
Web -> Controller: @search
Controller -> Person: find()
Person --> Controller: 
Controller -> Blade: 
Blade -> Person: getData()
Person --> Blade: 
@enduml
